mxGraphModel.root:
<mxCell id="ap" value="WiFi Access Point
SSID: ESP32-Audio-AP (hidden)
IP: 192.168.4.1
WPA2-AES | Channel 1 | SoftAP" style="shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontColor=#003366;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1">
<mxCell id="server" value="ESP32 #1 — SERVER
IP: 192.168.4.1 (fixed)
MAC: a4:f0:0f:84:05:60
Mode: WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP)
Framework: Arduino
Port 80 — WebServer.h (HTTP)
GET /status
GET /audio/info
Port 8080 — WiFiServer (Raw TCP)
POST /upload → audioBuffer RAM
GET /audio.wav ← audioBuffer RAM" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=top;align=center;spacingTop=6;" vertex="1" parent="1">
<mxCell id="client" value="ESP32 #2 — CLIENT
IP: 192.168.4.2 (DHCP)
MAC: f4:65:0b:d7:ce:70
Mode: WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA)
Framework: Arduino
Port 81 — WebServer.h (HTTP)
GET /status
POST /audio/push_builtin
POST /audio/fetch
Port 8081 — WiFiServer (Raw TCP)
POST /upload → audioBuffer RAM
GET /audio.wav ← audioBuffer RAM" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=top;align=center;spacingTop=6;" vertex="1" parent="1">
<mxCell id="e_sv_ap" value="WiFi.softAP()
Phát WiFi AP" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.2;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;fillColor=#dae8fc;" edge="1" parent="1" source="server" target="ap">
<mxCell id="e_cl_ap" value="WiFi.begin()
Kết nối AP" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.8;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;fillColor=#d5e8d4;" edge="1" parent="1" source="client" target="ap">
<mxCell id="e_push" value="POST /upload
Port 8080 | Raw TCP
audio/wav | 16 044 bytes
chunk 1024 B / timeout 15s" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0;exitY=0.45;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.45;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2.5;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="client" target="server">
<mxCell id="e_fetch" value="GET /audio.wav
Port 8080 | Raw TCP
Response: binary WAV
Content-Length + close" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=1;exitY=0.6;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.6;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#6a9153;strokeWidth=2.5;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="server" target="client">
